edges.name: RoleUserMembership
edges.description: Edge between a Role and a User, identified by the (roleId, username) tuple. Established by assignRoleToUser, observable only via searchUsersForRole.

edges.name: TenantUserMembership
edges.description: Edge between a Tenant and a User, identified by the (tenantId, username) tuple. Established by assignUserToTenant, observable only via searchUsersForTenant.

edges.name: GroupUserMembership
edges.description: Edge between a Group and a User, identified by the (groupId, username) tuple. Established by assignUserToGroup, observable only via searchUsersForGroup.

edges.name: RoleMappingRuleMembership
edges.description: Edge between a Role and a MappingRule, identified by the (roleId, mappingRuleId) tuple. Established by assignRoleToMappingRule, observable only via searchMappingRulesForRole.

edges.name: GroupMappingRuleMembership
edges.description: Edge between a Group and a MappingRule, identified by the (groupId, mappingRuleId) tuple. Established by assignMappingRuleToGroup, observable only via searchMappingRulesForGroup.

edges.name: TenantMappingRuleMembership
edges.description: Edge between a Tenant and a MappingRule, identified by the (tenantId, mappingRuleId) tuple. Established by assignMappingRuleToTenant, observable only via searchMappingRulesForTenant.

edges.name: RoleGroupMembership
edges.description: Edge between a Role and a Group, identified by the (roleId, groupId) tuple. Established by assignRoleToGroup, observable only via searchGroupsForRole.

edges.name: RoleClientMembership
edges.description: Edge between a Role and a Client, identified by the (roleId, clientId) tuple. Established by assignRoleToClient, observable only via searchClientsForRole. Client is an external-entity kind (identifier minted outside the Camunda REST API).

edges.name: GroupClientMembership
edges.description: Edge between a Group and a Client, identified by the (groupId, clientId) tuple. Established by assignClientToGroup, observable only via searchClientsForGroup. Client is an external-entity kind.

edges.name: TenantClientMembership
edges.description: Edge between a Tenant and a Client, identified by the (tenantId, clientId) tuple. Established by assignClientToTenant, observable only via searchClientsForTenant. Client is an external-entity kind.

edges.name: TenantGroupMembership
edges.description: Edge between a Tenant and a Group, identified by the (tenantId, groupId) tuple. Established by assignGroupToTenant, observable only via searchGroupIdsForTenant.

edges.name: TenantRoleMembership
edges.description: Edge between a Tenant and a Role, identified by the (tenantId, roleId) tuple. Established by assignRoleToTenant, observable only via searchRolesForTenant.
